title: picea excelsa var. pumila
intro: Picea excelsa var. pumila, also known as the Siberian spruce or dwarf Siberian spruce, is a small evergreen tree or shrub that belongs to the pine family and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Picea excelsa var. pumila include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of terpenes and essential oils in its needles. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Picea excelsa var. pumila are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from colds and flu to skin irritations and wounds.
